case_title: WORKERS COMPENSATION SOLUTIONS LLC VS. ABM SERVICES INC.

docket_entries.description: PETITION TO VACATE CONTRACTUAL ARBITRATION AWARD FILED BY RESPONDENT ABM SERVICES INC.

DECLARATION OF WILLIAM GREEN IN OPPOSITION TO ABM'S PETITION TO VACATE ARBITRATOIN AWARD AND IN SUPPORT OF WCS' PETITION TO CONFIRM ARBITRATION AWARD FILED BY PETITIONER WORKERS COMPENSATION SOLUTIONS LLC

LAW AND MOTION 302, PETITIONER WORKERS COMPENSATION SOLUTIONS LLC'S HEARING ON PETITION TO CONFIRM ARBITRATION AWARD IS CONTINUED TO AUGUST 22, 2014 AT 9:30 AM IN DEPT. 302, TO GIVE ABM A CHANCE TO COMPLY WITH SAN FRANCISCO LOCAL RULE 2.6B. ABM SHALL IMMEDIATELY PROVIDE COURTESY COPIES OF ITS FILINGS WITH A COVER LETTER REFLECTING THE NEW HEARING DATE. JUDGE: ERNEST H. GOLDSMITH; CLERK: GINA GONZALES; NOT REPORTED.

LAW AND MOTION 302, PETITIONER WORKERS COMPENSATION SOLUTIONS LLC'S PETITION TO CONFIRM ARBITRATION AWARD IS CONTINUED ON THE COURT'S MOTION TO SEPTEMBER 12, 2014. JUDGE: ERNEST H. GOLDSMITH, CLERK: CYNTHIA HERBERT, NOT REPORTED. (302/EHG)

MINI MINUTES FOR AUG-22-2014 09:30 AM FOR DEPT 302

NOTICE OF ENTRY OF ORDER/NOTICE OF RULING FILED GRANTING MOTION TO CONFIRM ARBITRATION AWARD AND ORDER DENYING PETITION TO VACATE ARBITRATION AWARD FILED BY PETITIONER WORKERS COMPENSATION SOLUTIONS LLC

LAW AND MOTION 302, PETITIONER WORKERS COMPENSATION SOLUTIONS LLC'S PETITION TO CONFIRM ARBITRATION AWARD IS GRANTED. ABM SERVICES, INC.'S PETITION TO VACATE THE ARBITRATION AWARD IS DENIED. ABM FAILS TO SHOW THAT THE AWARD WAS PROCURED BY FRAUD, THAT THE ARBITRATOR EXCEEDED HIS POWERS, OR THAT ITS RIGHTS WERE SUBSTANTIALLY PREJUDICED BY A REFUSAL TO POSTPONE THE HEARING TO HEAR MATERIAL EVIDENCE. SEE CCP 1286.2(A). ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: CYNTHIA HERBERT; REPORTER: ANN DELGADO, CSR # 11185 =302/JR

calendar.matters:
Ntc Of Hrg On Petition To Confirm Arb Award
Off Calendar Sep-12-2014 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES - ATTY. WILLIAM GREEN OF DELFINO GREEN & GREEN, TEL. NO. 442-4646 APPEARING FOR THE PETITIONER;
ATTY. KEITH CHRESTIONSON OF FOX ROTHSCHILD LLP, TEL. NO. 364-5540 APPEARING FOR THE RESPONDENT.

RULING - A R G U E D; The Court adopted its tentative ruling. PETITIONER WORKERS COMPENSATION SOLUTIONS LLC's Petition To Confirm Arbitration Award is granted. ABM Services, Inc.'s Petition to Vacate the Arbitration Award is denied. ABM fails to show that the award was procured by fraud, that the arbitrator exceeded his powers, or that its rights were substantially prejudiced by a refusal to postpone the hearing to hear material evidence. See CCP 1286.2(a). ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. Judge: A. James Robertson II; Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Reporter: Ann Delgado, CSR # 11185 =302/JR

Ntc Of Hrg On Petition To Confirm Arb Award
Off Calendar Aug-22-2014 Continued To Sep-12-14 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302

Ntc Of Hrg On Petition To Confirm Arb Award

MINI MINUTES:
No appearance. The tentative ruling is adopted. PETITIONER WORKERS COMPENSATION SOLUTIONS LLC'S Hearing On Petition To Confirm Arbitration Award is continued to August 22, 2014 at 9:30 am in Dept. 302, to give ABM a chance to comply with San Francisco Local Rule 2.6B. ABM shall immediately provide courtesy copies of its filings with a cover letter reflecting the new hearing date. Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Not reported.
